overall.description: A cinematic journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis at night, captured from an elevated transit walkway. The scene features persistent heavy rain, dense atmospheric fog, and vibrant neon illumination in red and cyan hues, with holographic advertisements and futuristic skyscrapers dominating the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit walkway overlooking neon-lit intersection

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward along the elevated covered walkway, observing the rain-soaked city streets below

entered.detail: enclosed elevated transit tunnel with glass sides and metal roof structure
large floating digital advertisement screen displaying animated content above the intersection
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the street
high-rise building adorned with vertical red neon light strips
multi-lane road junction below with moving vehicle traffic and wet reflective surfaces
vertical digital advertising column positioned in the center of the walkway approach

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from within a covered elevated transit walkway, looking out over a rain-drenched cyberpunk intersection. Neon lights in red and cyan reflect off wet surfaces below, while holographic advertisements glow in the distance. The camera moves steadily forward through the glass-enclosed walkway, with futuristic skyscrapers framing both sides of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit walkway approaching central billboard

events.description: passes the vertical advertising pillar as it moves to the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the elevated track, moving past structural supports while maintaining steady observation of the cityscape

segments.scene_description: The camera progresses deeper along the elevated walkway, passing the central advertising pillar which falls behind. The left glass tower looms larger on the near side, while the holographic billboard ahead grows more prominent in the center of the frame. The red neon lights of the right tower become more intense as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with close approach to holographic display

events.description: left glass tower moves out of frame as camera passes the building

agents.ego_description: approaching the large holographic billboard at the end of the walkway segment, with the city intersection visible below

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera approaches the large holographic billboard that now dominates the center view. The left skyscraper has passed out of sight behind the camera, while the right neon tower shifts toward the center-right. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating a hazy atmosphere around the bright neon lights of the city below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along an elevated transit walkway, transitioning from a wide view of a rain-drenched intersection toward a towering holographic advertisement. It begins within the glass-enclosed corridor, looking out over a cyberpunk cityscape where red and cyan neon lights reflect off wet surfaces and futuristic skyscrapers frame the horizon. As the camera progresses, a central advertising pillar recedes into the distance while the surrounding glass towers loom larger, intensifying the glow of the red neon lights on the right. The scene then shifts as the left skyscraper passes out of sight, allowing the massive holographic billboard to expand and dominate the center of the frame. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the hazy, rain-soaked atmosphere, with the bright neon lights of the city below blurring into a vibrant, atmospheric glow.
